creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alexey Dokuchaev from comment #13)
> Since you show interest it in this port, would you also consider maintaining it?
No. I only paid attention to this port because graphics/openshadinglanguage depends on it, from which in turn depends graphics/blender, which I was updating at the time.
I don’t even know what this software is for and how to work with it.
